evolved_hypotheses.title: Pourbaix-Quantified Fe-S Cluster Displacement — Predicting the Eh Window of Cuproptotic Lethality
evolved_hypotheses.bridge_mechanism: Cu-Fe sulfide displacement in Eh-pH space
evolved_hypotheses.key_change: Embeds Ksp-driven Fe-S displacement into ligand-extended Pourbaix framework; replaces ETC inhibitor test with FDX1 mutant library; adds CIA vs LIAS differential prediction

evolved_hypotheses.title: CuS Oligomer Buffering — Sub-Nanoparticle Copper-Sulfide Coordination Polymers as Mitochondrial Copper Reservoirs
evolved_hypotheses.key_change: Downscales from physically impossible nanoparticles to sub-nanoparticle oligomers; replaces TEM/EDX with XAS/EXAFS for non-crystalline detection

evolved_hypotheses.title: Cuproptosis as Evolutionary Relic — Fe-S Displacement as Selection Pressure for FDX1-LIAS Co-Evolution
evolved_hypotheses.bridge_mechanism: Evolutionary co-selection driven by Cu-Fe displacement
evolved_hypotheses.key_change: Replaces infeasible protocell experiment with comparative genomics of Cu-tolerant organisms; grounds evolutionary narrative in specific displacement mechanism

evolved_hypotheses.title: FDX1 as Calibrated Kinetic Gate — Ligand-Extended Pourbaix With Elesclomol Speciation
evolved_hypotheses.key_change: Adds elesclomol speciation to Pourbaix; replaces ETC inhibitor test with E0' mutant library; explicit predict-THEN-measure protocol

mechanisms: Cu-Fe sulfide displacement in Eh-pH space (E1.1, E1.3)
FDX1 redox potential as kinetic gate (E1.4)

dropped_hypotheses.H1.1: Subsumed by E1.1 (dithiolane chemistry incorporated into Pourbaix displacement framework)
dropped_hypotheses.H1.6: Too similar to E1.2 in bridge mechanism, weaker novelty

self_critique_risks: E1.1: Thermodynamic databases may lack Fe-S cluster sulfide constants
E1.2: Sub-nanoparticle CuS oligomers may have picosecond lifetimes
E1.3: FDX1-LIAS co-occurrence may reflect Fe-S metabolism not Cu selection
E1.4: FDX1 E0' mutants may also alter Fe-S biogenesis
